mapper.select: SELECT id, production_line_id AS productionLineId, inbound_no AS inboundNo, material_code_id AS materialCodeId, material_code AS materialCode, material_name AS materialName, model_specification AS modelSpecification, warehouse_location_id AS warehouseLocationId, area_code AS areaCode, location_code AS locationCode, inbound_qty AS inboundQty, unit_price AS unitPrice, inbound_amount AS inboundAmount, inbound_status AS inboundStatus, inventory_property AS inventoryProperty, inbound_type AS inboundType, inbound_date AS inboundDate, creator_id AS creatorId, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM inbound_request WHERE id = #{id} AND creator_id = #{creatorId}
SELECT id, inbound_no AS inboundNo FROM inbound_request WHERE inbound_no = #{inboundNo} AND id != #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM inbound_request WHERE id IN #{id}
